title: 10 best herbal teas for sinusitis
description: Lemon verbena teas helps with sinusitis because it contains antiviral and anti-inflammatory properties that soothe and calm the nasal passages, reducing congestion and swelling. The tea's natural decongestant qualities help to loosen and clear mucus from the sinuses, making it easier to breathe. Additionally, lemon verbena's expectorant properties help to thin out mucus, allowing it to be more easily eliminated from the body, providing relief from sinus pressure and discomfort....
